```
<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/src/components/GooeyToast.css</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: /* Spinner animation */
2: .gooey-spinnerSpin {
3:   animation: gooey-spin 1s linear infinite;
4: }
5:
6: @keyframes gooey-spin {
7:   from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
8:   to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
9: }
10:
11: /* Center position: center the toast within Sonner's container */
12: [data-sonner-toast][data-x-position="center"] {
13:   left: 0 !important;
14:   right: 0 !important;
15:   margin-left: auto !important;
16:   margin-right: auto !important;
17:   width: fit-content !important;
18: }
19:
20: /* Fix mobile centering: override Sonner's mobile offset variables for center positions */
21: @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
22:   [data-sonner-toaster][data-x-position='center'] {
23:     left: 50% !important;
24:     right: auto !important;
25:     transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
26:   }
27: }
28:
29: /* Style detection marker — used by GooeyToaster to verify CSS is loaded */
30: [data-gooey-toast-css] { --gooey-toast: 1; }
31:
32: /* When Sonner expands the stack (hover), shorten height/transform CSS transitions
33:    so our syncSonnerHeights corrections apply quickly (~150ms instead of 400ms).
34:    Sonner writes stale --offset values from its React state; 400ms correction
35:    causes visible overlap. 150ms is fast enough to prevent overlap while keeping
36:    stacking spread and entry animations smooth. */
37: [data-sonner-toast][data-expanded="true"] {
38:   transition: transform 0.15s, opacity 0.4s, height 0.15s, box-shadow 0.2s !important;
39: }
40:
41:
42: /* ============================================
43:    Wrapper — single container for both states
44:    ============================================ */
45: .gooey-wrapper {
46:   pointer-events: auto;
47:   cursor: default;
48:   font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
49:   position: relative;
50:   width: fit-content;
51: }
52:
53: /* SVG background — parametric morph from pill to blob */
54: .gooey-blobSvg {
55:   position: absolute;
56:   top: 0;
57:   left: 0;
58:   overflow: visible;
59:   pointer-events: none;
60:   filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06))
61:           drop-shadow(0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04));
62: }
63:
64: /* Content on top of SVG background */
65: .gooey-content {
66:   position: relative;
67:   z-index: 1;
68:   transition: padding 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
69: }
70:
71: .gooey-contentCompact {
72:   padding: 7px 10px 7px 10px;
73: }
74:
75: .gooey-contentExpanded {
76:   padding: 7px 10px 16px 10px;
77:   min-width: 300px;
78:   max-width: 380px;
79: }
80:
81: /* ============================================
82:    Shared
83:    ============================================ */
84: .gooey-header {
85:   display: inline-flex;
86:   align-items: center;
87:   gap: 8px;
88:   color: inherit;
89: }
90:
91: .gooey-header > .gooey-title,
92: .gooey-header > .gooey-timestamp {
93:   min-width: 0;
94:   text-overflow: ellipsis;
95:   overflow: hidden;
96:   white-space: nowrap;
97: }
98:
99: .gooey-header > .gooey-timestamp {
100:   margin-left: auto;
101: }
102:
103: .gooey-iconWrapper {
104:   display: flex;
105:   align-items: center;
106:   justify-content: center;
107:   flex-shrink: 0;
108:   width: 18px;
109:   height: 18px;
110:   line-height: 0;
111: }
112:
113: .gooey-title {
114:   font-size: 12px;
115:   font-weight: 700;
116:   line-height: 1;
117:   white-space: nowrap;
118:   color: inherit;
119:   padding: 0 4px 0 2px;
120: }
121:
122: .gooey-titleDefault { color: #555; }
123: .gooey-titleSuccess { color: #4CAF50; }
124: .gooey-titleError { color: #E53935; }
125: .gooey-titleWarning { color: #C49000; }
126: .gooey-titleInfo { color: #1E88E5; }

135:   padding-left: 6px;

144:   overflow: hidden;
145: }
146:
147: .gooey-actionWrapper {
148:   margin-top: 12px;

150: }
151:
152: .gooey-actionButton {
```

```
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { useEffect } from 'react'
2: import { Toaster } from 'sonner'
3: import type { GooeyToasterProps } from '../types'
4: import { animationPresets } from '../presets'
5: import { setGooeyPosition, setGooeyDir, setGooeySpring, setGooeyBounce, setGooeyVisibleToasts, setContainerHovered, setGooeySwipeToDismiss, setGooeyCloseOnEscape, setGooeyTheme, setGooeyMaxQueue, setGooeyQueueOverflow, setGooeyShowProgress, setGooeyCloseButton } from '../context'
6: import { gooeyToast, _getMostRecentActiveId } from '../gooey-toast'
7: import { AriaLiveAnnouncer } from './AriaLiveAnnouncer'
8:
9: export function GooeyToaster({
10:   position = 'bottom-right',
11:   duration,
12:   gap = 14,
13:   offset = '24px',
14:   theme = 'light',
15:   toastOptions,
16:   expand,
17:   closeButton,
18:   richColors,
19:   visibleToasts,
20:   dir,
21:   preset,
22:   spring,
23:   bounce,
24:   swipeToDismiss = true,
25:   closeOnEscape = true,
26:   maxQueue = Infinity,
27:   queueOverflow = 'drop-oldest',
28:   showProgress = false,
29: }: GooeyToasterProps) {
30:   const presetConfig = preset ? animationPresets[preset] : undefined
31:   const resolvedSpring = spring ?? presetConfig?.spring ?? true
32:   const resolvedBounce = bounce ?? presetConfig?.bounce
33:
34:   useEffect(() => {
35:     setGooeyPosition(position)
36:   }, [position])
37:
38:   useEffect(() => {
39:     setGooeyDir(dir ?? 'ltr')
40:   }, [dir])
41:
42:   useEffect(() => {
43:     setGooeyTheme(theme)
44:   }, [theme])
45:
46:   useEffect(() => {
47:     setGooeySpring(resolvedSpring)
48:   }, [resolvedSpring])
49:
50:   useEffect(() => {
51:     setGooeyBounce(resolvedBounce)
52:   }, [resolvedBounce])
53:
54:   useEffect(() => {
55:     setGooeySwipeToDismiss(swipeToDismiss)
56:   }, [swipeToDismiss])
57:
58:   useEffect(() => {
59:     setGooeyCloseOnEscape(closeOnEscape)
60:   }, [closeOnEscape])
61:
62:   useEffect(() => {
63:     if (!closeOnEscape) return
64:
65:     const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
66:       if (e.key === 'Escape') {
67:         const recentId = _getMostRecentActiveId()
68:         if (recentId != null) {
69:           gooeyToast.dismiss(recentId)
70:         }
71:       }
72:     }
73:
74:     document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
75:     return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
76:   }, [closeOnEscape])
77:
78:   useEffect(() => {
79:     setGooeyVisibleToasts(visibleToasts ?? 3)
80:   }, [visibleToasts])
81:
82:   useEffect(() => {
83:     setGooeyMaxQueue(maxQueue)
84:   }, [maxQueue])
85:
86:   useEffect(() => {
87:     setGooeyQueueOverflow(queueOverflow)
88:   }, [queueOverflow])
89:
90:   useEffect(() => {
91:     setGooeyShowProgress(showProgress)
92:   }, [showProgress])
93:
94:   useEffect(() => {
95:     setGooeyCloseButton(closeButton ?? false)
96:   }, [closeButton])
97:
98:   // Detect hover on the Sonner container and broadcast to all GooeyToast instances.
99:   // Uses Sonner's `data-expanded` attribute (set per-toast <li>) as the hover signal
100:   // rather than raw mouseenter/mouseleave on the <ol>. This is more reliable because
101:   // Sonner manages it with onMouseEnter + onMouseMove + onMouseLeave, and it survives
102:   // <ol> remounts (all toasts dismissed then new ones appear).
103:   useEffect(() => {
104:     let expandObs: MutationObserver | null = null
105:     let currentOl: HTMLElement | null = null
106:
107:     const syncFromExpanded = (ol: HTMLElement) => {
108:       const anyExpanded = ol.querySelector('[data-sonner-toast][data-expanded="true"]') !== null
109:       setContainerHovered(anyExpanded)
110:     }
111:
112:     const attach = (ol: HTMLElement) => {
113:       if (ol === currentOl) return
114:       expandObs?.disconnect()
115:       currentOl = ol
116:       expandObs = new MutationObserver(() => syncFromExpanded(ol))
117:       expandObs.observe(ol, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['data-expanded'], subtree: true })
118:       syncFromExpanded(ol)
119:     }
120:
121:     const el = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[data-sonner-toaster]')
122:     if (el) attach(el)
123:
124:     // Re-discover if the <ol> is remounted (e.g. all toasts dismissed then new ones appear).
125:     // Debounce via rAF to coalesce rapid DOM mutations (e.g. multiple toasts mounting).
126:     let bodyRafId = 0
127:     const bodyObs = new MutationObserver(() => {
128:       if (bodyRafId) return
129:       bodyRafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
130:         bodyRafId = 0
131:         const found = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[data-sonner-toaster]')
132:         if (found) {
133:           attach(found)
134:         } else if (currentOl) {
135:           expandObs?.disconnect()
136:           currentOl = null
137:           setContainerHovered(false)
138:         }
139:       })
140:     })
141:     bodyObs.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true })
142:
143:     return () => {
144:       if (bodyRafId) cancelAnimationFrame(bodyRafId)
145:       bodyObs.disconnect()
146:       expandObs?.disconnect()
147:       setContainerHovered(false)
148:     }
149:   }, [])
150:
151:   useEffect(() => {
152:     if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'development') return
153:
154:     const el = document.createElement('div')
155:     el.setAttribute('data-gooey-toast-css', '')
156:     el.style.position = 'absolute'
157:     el.style.width = '0'
158:     el.style.height = '0'
159:     el.style.overflow = 'hidden'
160:     el.style.pointerEvents = 'none'
161:     document.body.appendChild(el)
162:
163:     const value = getComputedStyle(el).getPropertyValue('--gooey-toast')
164:     document.body.removeChild(el)
165:
166:     if (!value) {
167:       console.warn(
168:         '[gooey-toast] Styles not found. Make sure to import the CSS:\n\n' +
169:         '  import "goey-toast/styles.css";\n'
170:       )
171:     }
172:   }, [])
173:
174:   return (
175:     <>
176:       <Toaster
177:         position={position}
178:         duration={duration}
179:         gap={gap}
180:         offset={offset}
181:         theme={theme}
182:         toastOptions={{ unstyled: true, ...toastOptions }}
183:         expand={expand}
184:         closeButton={false}
185:         richColors={richColors}
186:         visibleToasts={99}
187:         dir={dir}
188:       />
189:       <AriaLiveAnnouncer />
190:     </>
191:   )
192: }

(End of file - total 192 lines)
```

For expanded toasts:

- GooeyToast has the display timer
- When timer expires, start collapse morph (dismissing=true)
- When collapse completes, emit('dismiss')

For external dismiss (API call):

- toast.dismissRequested = true
- GooeyToast watches this and either collapses first (if expanded) or dismisses directly

Actually, I should stick with TransitionGroup but be more careful about conflicting transforms. Vue's TransitionGroup applies CSS classes sequentially during enter and leave phases—`v-leave-from` sets the initial state, `v-leave-active` enables the transition, then `v-leave-to` defines the end state. If the toast has an inline transform for positioning, and I add a transform in `v-enter-from` for the slide effect, there's a CSS specificity question—which transform wins? Inline styles have higher specificity, so the inline transform would override the class-based transform. That's a problem.

The solution is to apply the enter/leave transforms to a wrapper element (like a div around the toast), not the toast itself. The wrapper handles the enter/leave animations (opacity + slide), while the toast inside handles its own positioning transform. This way there's no conflict. Finishing the leave handler...

## Assistant (Compaction · Claude Opus 4.6 · 98.3s)

## Goal

将 `goey-toast-react` 库完整移植为 `goey-toast-vue`（Vue 3 版本），保持 100% 功能对等和一致的公开 API。

## Instructions

- **动画引擎**: 使用 Motion (motion.dev) 替代 Framer Motion（React 专属）
- **Toast 管理**: 从零实现 toast 容器（ToastContainer.vue），不使用 Sonner 或 vue-sonner
- **Vue 版本**: 仅支持 Vue 3 (>=3.3)
- **功能范围**: 100% 功能对等 React 版（SVG 形变、弹簧物理、队列、所有 toast 类型、promise toast、进度条、时间戳、自定义颜色/类名、无障碍、RTL、滑动关闭、Escape 关闭等）
- **API 风格**: 对齐 React 版（gooeyToast / GooeyToaster 命名一致）
- **架构**: Vue 惯用法重写（方案 A）— 内部用 Vue 响应式系统（reactive/ref/computed），外部 API 保持一致
- **构建**: Vite 库模式 + vite-plugin-vue（处理 SFC），输出 ESM + CJS + 类型声明 + CSS
- **测试**: Vitest + @vue/test-utils
- **设计规格文档位于**: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue-design.md`
- 使用 superpowers 技能流程：brainstorming → writing-plans → 实施
- **实施计划应写入**: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue.md`
- 使用 writing-plans 技能编写计划：TDD、bite-sized tasks（每步2-5分钟）、无 placeholder、完整代码、频繁 commit
- writing-plans 技能要求：每个 plan 必须有 header（含 Goal/Architecture/Tech Stack），task 用 checkbox 语法，每步是单一动作，所有代码完整无省略，自审后交给用户选择执行方式（subagent-driven 或 inline）
- **用户最新指示**: 拆分任务并创建 TODOs 和 Plan。如果有下一步就继续执行，如果不确定就停下来问。

## Discoveries

- React 版核心组件 `GooeyToast.tsx` 有 1350 行，CSS 367 行
- React 版依赖 Sonner 做 toast 管理但大量 hack 其 CSS 变量（`syncSonnerHeights`、MutationObserver），从零实现反而更干净
- Motion (motion.dev) 的 `animate()` API 与 Framer Motion 几乎完全相同，动画代码迁移成本极低
- **可直接复用的代码（约 40%）**: SVG 形变纯函数（morphPathRaw, morphPathCenterRaw）、弹簧物理参数（squishSpring）、动画预设（presets.ts）、CSS 样式、类名映射（gooey-styles.ts）、队列核心逻辑、图标 SVG path 数据
- **需要重写的代码（约 60%）**: GooeyToast.vue（最复杂）、ToastContainer.vue（全新）、GooeyToaster.vue、gooey-toast.ts、context.ts、6 个图标 Vue SFC、composables、测试套件
- Vue 的响应式系统可以天然替代 React 版中手动实现的 pub/sub 模式（subscribeContainerHovered 等），代码更简洁
- Vue 不需要 React StrictMode 的双渲染保护（mountedRef 模式）
- 错误边界用 `onErrorCaptured()` 替代 React 的 Error Boundary class component
- React 的 `AnimatePresence mode="wait"` 用 Vue 的 `<Transition mode="out-in">` 替代

### Vue 版架构关键设计决策（在多次会话中确认/发现）

1. **context.ts**: 用 `reactive` 单例替代 React 版的 getter/setter 函数对。组件可直接 `import { _config } from './context'` 然后读 `_config.position`。动画回调中读取 reactive 属性不触发追踪，这正是期望行为。需要新增 `_config.duration` 以支持全局默认 duration（React 版通过 Sonner 的 Toaster duration prop 处理）。

2. **gooey-toast.ts 数据流**: 不再调用 `toast.custom()`（Sonner API），改为 push 到 `ref<InternalToast[]>` 响应式数组。`InternalToast` 对象使用 Vue 的深层响应式。`gooeyToast.update()` 直接修改 toast 对象属性（无需 React 版的 update listener 机制），Vue 响应式自动触发重渲染。Promise toast 也通过直接修改 reactive toast 属性来更新（无需 React 版的 PromiseToastWrapper）。

3. **Toast 生命周期（不同于 React 版）**:
   - 简单 toast（无描述/action）: GooeyToast 内部计时 → 超时后 emit 'dismiss' → ToastContainer 调用 `_onToastDismissed` 从 `_toasts` 移除
   - 展开 toast: GooeyToast 内部计时 → 超时后 collapse morph (morphT 1→0) → morph 完成后 emit 'dismiss' → 从 `_toasts` 移除
   - 外部 dismiss（API 调用）: 设置 `toast.dismissRequested = true` → GooeyToast watch 此 flag → 如果展开则播放收起动画后 emit 'dismiss'，如果简单则直接 emit 'dismiss'
   - 简单 toast 自动关闭 timer 需要在 GooeyToast 内部管理（React 版由 Sonner 管理），支持 hover 暂停/恢复

4. **ARIA 播报**: 用 `ref` + 自增 key (`_announceKey`) 确保相同消息重复播报时 watcher 仍触发（替代 React 版的 clear + rAF 模式）

5. **ToastContainer.vue** 替代 Sonner:
   - `<Teleport to="body">` + `<TransitionGroup :css="false" @enter @leave>` + `<ol>` fixed 定位
   - 每个 `<li>` 绝对定位，offset 由累加高度计算（使用 ResizeObserver 跟踪每个 toast 高度）
   - hover 展开/折叠通过 `containerHovered` ref
   - 堆叠效果：非 hover 时 scale = 1 - i\*0.05
   - Enter/Leave 动画使用 JS hooks（opacity-only），避免与 inline transform 冲突
   - Position transform 使用 CSS transition 实现平滑重定位
   - 底部定位：`<li>` bottom:0，transform translateY 负值向上堆叠；顶部定位：`<li>` top:0，正值向下堆叠

6. **类型差异**: `ReactNode` → `string`（description）、`Component`（icon）。移除 Sonner 特有类型（`ToasterProps['position']` → 自定义 `ToastPosition`，移除 `toastOptions`、`richColors`）。新增 `ToastPosition = 'top-left' | 'top-center' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center' | 'bottom-right'`。

7. **GooeyToast.vue 内部状态**:
   - 响应式 state（ref）: `actionSuccess`, `dismissing`, `progressKey`, `hovered`, `showBody`, `dims`
   - 非响应式 state（let 变量）: `morphT`, `aDims`, `collapsing`, `preDismiss`, `collapseEndTime`, `expandedDims`, `lastSquishTime`, `mountSquished`, `prevShowBody`, `prevPhase`, `headerSquished`, `remaining`, `timerStart`, `progressDelay`, `reExpanding`, `hoveredSyncFlag`
   - 动画控制器（let 变量）: `morphCtrl`, `pillResizeCtrl`, `headerSquishCtrl`, `blobSquishCtrl`, `shakeCtrl`
   - Template refs: `wrapperRef`, `pathRef`, `headerRef`, `contentRef`
   - flush() 直接操作 DOM，不触发 Vue 响应式

8. **CSS 改动**: 移除所有 `[data-sonner-toast]`/`[data-sonner-toaster]` 选择器和 Sonner-specific CSS（约 30 行）。新增 `.gooey-container` 容器样式 + `.gooey-toast-li` 列表项样式 + `.gooey-icon-enter/leave` 图标过渡 + `.gooey-body-enter/leave` body 过渡。

9. **Composables**:
   - `usePrefersReducedMotion`: `matchMedia` 监听，返回 `Ref<boolean>`，在 `onMounted`/`onUnmounted` 中管理 listener
   - `useSwipeToDismiss`: 封装 touch 手势，返回 `{ deltaX, swiping, opacity, onTouchStart, onTouchMove, onTouchEnd }`
   - 决定**不**单独提取 `useToastTimer` — timer 逻辑与 GooeyToast 内部状态耦合太深，保持 inline

````
<skill_content name="writing-plans">
# Skill: writing-plans

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.

Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."

**Context:** This should be run in a dedicated worktree (created by brainstorming skill).

**Save plans to:** `docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<feature-name>.md`
- (User preferences for plan location override this default)

## Scope Check

If the spec covers multiple independent subsystems, it should have been broken into sub-project specs during brainstorming. If it wasn't, suggest breaking this into separate plans — one per subsystem. Each plan should produce working, testable software on its own.

## File Structure

Before defining tasks, map out which files will be created or modified and what each one is responsible for. This is where decomposition decisions get locked in.

- Design units with clear boundaries and well-defined interfaces. Each file should have one clear responsibility.
- You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. Prefer smaller, focused files over large ones that do too much.
- Files that change together should live together. Split by responsibility, not by technical layer.
- In existing codebases, follow established patterns. If the codebase uses large files, don't unilaterally restructure - but if a file you're modifying has grown unwieldy, including a split in the plan is reasonable.

This structure informs the task decomposition. Each task should produce self-contained changes that make sense independently.

## Bite-Sized Task Granularity

**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
- "Write the failing test" - step
- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
- "Commit" - step

## Plan Document Header

**Every plan MUST start with this header:**

```markdown
# [Feature Name] Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** [One sentence describing what this builds]

**Architecture:** [2-3 sentences about approach]

**Tech Stack:** [Key technologies/libraries]

---
````

## Task Structure

````markdown
### Task N: [Component Name]

**Files:**

- Create: `exact/path/to/file.py`
- Modify: `exact/path/to/existing.py:123-145`
- Test: `tests/exact/path/to/test.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

```python
def test_specific_behavior():
    result = function(input)
    assert result == expected
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test to verify it fails**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: FAIL with "function not defined"

- [ ] **Step 3: Write minimal implementation**

```python
def function(input):
    return expected
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run test to verify it passes**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: PASS

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add tests/path/test.py src/path/file.py
git commit -m "feat: add specific feature"
```
````

## No Placeholders

Every step must contain the actual content an engineer needs. These are **plan failures** — never write them:

- "TBD", "TODO", "implement later", "fill in details"
- "Add appropriate error handling" / "add validation" / "handle edge cases"
- "Write tests for the above" (without actual test code)
- "Similar to Task N" (repeat the code — the engineer may be reading tasks out of order)
- Steps that describe what to do without showing how (code blocks required for code steps)
- References to types, functions, or methods not defined in any task

## Remember

- Exact file paths always
- Complete code in every step — if a step changes code, show the code
- Exact commands with expected output
- DRY, YAGNI, TDD, frequent commits

## Self-Review

After writing the complete plan, look at the spec with fresh eyes and check the plan against it. This is a checklist you run yourself — not a subagent dispatch.

**1. Spec coverage:** Skim each section/requirement in the spec. Can you point to a task that implements it? List any gaps.

**2. Placeholder scan:** Search your plan for red flags — any of the patterns from the "No Placeholders" section above. Fix them.

**3. Type consistency:** Do the types, method signatures, and property names you used in later tasks match what you defined in earlier tasks? A function called `clearLayers()` in Task 3 but `clearFullLayers()` in Task 7 is a bug.

If you find issues, fix them inline. No need to re-review — just fix and move on. If you find a spec requirement with no task, add the task.

## Execution Handoff

After saving the plan, offer execution choice:

**"Plan complete and saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/<filename>.md`. Two execution options:**

**1. Subagent-Driven (recommended)** - I dispatch a fresh subagent per task, review between tasks, fast iteration

**2. Inline Execution** - Execute tasks in this session using executing-plans, batch execution with checkpoints

**Which approach?"**

**If Subagent-Driven chosen:**

- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review

**If Inline Execution chosen:**

- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:executing-plans
- Batch execution with checkpoints for review

Base directory for this skill: file:///Users/joe/.cache/opencode/packages/superpowers@git+https:/github.com/obra/superpowers.git/node_modules/superpowers/skills/writing-plans
Relative paths in this skill (e.g., scripts/, reference/) are relative to this base directory.
Note: file list is sampled.

</skill_content>

````
<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue-design.md</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # goey-toast-vue — 设计规格
2:
3: > 将 goey-toast-react 库完整移植到 Vue 3，保持 100% 功能对等和一致的公开 API。
4:
5: ## 概述
6:
7: goey-toast-react 是一个基于 Sonner + Framer Motion 的有机形态 toast 通知库，核心视觉特色是 SVG 参数化形变（pill → blob）和弹簧物理动画。本设计将其移植到 Vue 3 生态，使用 Motion (motion.dev) 替代 Framer Motion，从零实现 toast 容器替代 Sonner。
8:
9: ## 技术决策
10:
11: | 决策 | 选择 | 理由 |
12: |---|---|---|
13: | 动画引擎 | Motion (motion.dev) | Framer Motion 的框架无关版，API 几乎相同，迁移成本最低 |
14: | Toast 管理底层 | 从零实现 | Sonner 是 React 专属；React 版本大量 hack Sonner，自实现反而更干净 |
15: | Vue 版本 | 仅 Vue 3 (>=3.3) | 使用 Composition API、Teleport、defineProps 泛型等现代特性 |
16: | 功能范围 | 100% 对等 | 所有 toast 类型、SVG 形变、弹簧物理、队列、无障碍等 |
17: | API 风格 | 对齐 React 版 | gooeyToast / GooeyToaster 命名一致，零学习成本 |
18: | 架构方式 | Vue 惯用法重写 | 内部用 Vue 响应式系统，外部 API 保持一致 |
19:
20: ## 包信息
21:
22: - **包名**: `goey-toast-vue`
23: - **Peer 依赖**: `vue@>=3.3.0`, `motion@>=11.0.0`
24: - **构建**: Vite 库模式 + vite-plugin-vue（处理 SFC），输出 ESM + CJS + 类型声明 + CSS
25: - **测试**: Vitest + @vue/test-utils
26: - **Node**: >=18.0.0
27: - **License**: MIT
28:
29: ## 文件结构
30:
31: ```
32: goey-toast-vue/
33: ├── package.json
34: ├── tsconfig.json
35: ├── vite.config.ts              # Vite 库模式构建
36: ├── vitest.config.ts
37: ├── src/
38: │   ├── index.ts                # 公开导出
39: │   ├── types.ts                # TypeScript 类型定义
40: │   ├── context.ts              # 全局配置（reactive 单例）
41: │   ├── presets.ts              # 动画预设（smooth/bouncy/subtle/snappy）
42: │   ├── gooey-toast.ts          # Toast API + 队列管理
43: │   ├── morph.ts                # SVG 形变纯函数（提取自核心组件）
44: │   ├── spring.ts               # 弹簧物理参数函数
45: │   ├── composables/
46: │   │   ├── usePrefersReducedMotion.ts
47: │   │   ├── useToastTimer.ts    # 自动关闭计时器（含暂停/恢复）
48: │   │   └── useSwipeToDismiss.ts # 滑动关闭手势
49: │   ├── components/
50: │   │   ├── GooeyToaster.vue    # 顶层 Provider
51: │   │   ├── GooeyToast.vue      # 核心 toast 组件
52: │   │   ├── GooeyToast.css      # 样式
53: │   │   ├── gooey-styles.ts     # 类名映射
54: │   │   ├── ToastContainer.vue  # Toast 堆叠容器（替代 Sonner）
55: │   │   ├── AriaLiveAnnouncer.vue
56: │   │   └── ToastErrorBoundary.vue
57: │   ├── icons/                  # SVG 图标组件（Vue SFC）
58: │   │   ├── index.ts
59: │   │   ├── DefaultIcon.vue
60: │   │   ├── SuccessIcon.vue
61: │   │   ├── ErrorIcon.vue
62: │   │   ├── WarningIcon.vue
63: │   │   ├── InfoIcon.vue
64: │   │   └── SpinnerIcon.vue
65: │   └── __tests__/
66: │       ├── setup.ts
67: │       ├── gooey-toast.test.ts
68: │       ├── GooeyToaster.test.ts
69: │       ├── GooeyToast.test.ts
70: │       ├── ToastContainer.test.ts
71: │       ├── AriaLiveAnnouncer.test.ts
72: │       ├── ToastErrorBoundary.test.ts
73: │       ├── usePrefersReducedMotion.test.ts
74: │       ├── morph.test.ts
75: │       └── spring.test.ts
76: └── demo/                       # Vite + Vue 3 示例应用
77: ```
78:
79: ## 架构设计
80:
81: ### 组件层次
82:
83: ```
84: App
85: └── GooeyToaster (props: position, theme, spring, ...)
86:     ├── ToastContainer (Teleport to body)
87:     │   └── <li v-for="toast in activeToasts">
88:     │       └── ToastErrorBoundary
89:     │           └── GooeyToast (核心组件)
90:     │               ├── SVG <path> (形变动画)
91:     │               ├── Header (图标 + 标题 + 关闭按钮)
92:     │               ├── Body (描述 + 操作按钮)
93:     │               ├── Progress Bar
94:     │               └── Timestamp
95:     └── AriaLiveAnnouncer
96: ```
97:
98: ### 数据流
99:
100: ```
101: 用户调用 gooeyToast('Hello')
102:   → gooey-toast.ts: createGooeyToast()
103:     → 检查 _activeIds.size < visibleToasts?
104:       → 是: push 到 _toasts (reactive ref)
105:       → 否: push 到 _queue
106:     → announce() 触发 ARIA 播报
107:   → ToastContainer (watch _toasts) 自动渲染新 <li>
108:     → GooeyToast onMounted: 测量尺寸、触发登场弹性
109:     → 展开: morphT 0→1 动画、body 淡入
110:     → 自动关闭: useToastTimer 倒计时
111:     → 关闭: morphT 1→0 动画、弹性
112:     → emit('dismiss', id)
113:       → gooey-toast.ts: dismissGooeyToast(id)
114:         → 从 _toasts 移除
115:         → _onToastDismissed → processQueue
116: ```
117:
118: ### ToastContainer.vue — 替代 Sonner
119:
120: **定位**: `<ol>` 用 `position: fixed`，根据 position prop 设置 `top/bottom/left/right`。
121:
122: **堆叠**: 每个 `<li>` 用 CSS `translate3d(0, offset, 0)` 定位。`offset` 根据前面所有 toast 的实际高度 + gap 计算。高度通过 GooeyToast 的 `heightChange` 事件实时更新。
123:
124: **Hover 行为**: `mouseenter/mouseleave` 设置 `containerHovered` ref。hover 时所有 toast 恢复原始位置和 scale（展开），非 hover 时后方 toast 缩小并折叠。
125:
126: **堆叠 scale 效果**: 非 hover 时，第 i 个 toast 的 scale = `1 - i * 0.05`，translateY 增加偏移模拟深度。
127:
128: ### GooeyToast.vue — 核心组件
129:
130: **SVG 形变**: 使用 `morph.ts` 中的纯函数生成 SVG path。`animate()` 驱动 `morphT` 从 0→1（展开）或 1→0（收起），每帧调用 `flush()` 直接操作 DOM。
131:
132: **状态机**:
133: 1. Mount → pill only (morphT=0)
134: 2. Expand delay (330ms) → showBody=true → morphT: 0→1
135: 3. Display → 等待 auto-dismiss 计时器
136: 4. Pre-dismiss → dismissing=true → morphT: 1→0
137: 5. Post-collapse → emit dismiss
138:
139: **动画控制器**: Motion `animate()` 返回 `AnimationControls`，存为局部变量（非 ref）。每次新动画前 `.stop()` 旧控制器。
140:
141: **弹性效果**: `squishSpring()` 用 `bounce` 值（0-0.8）映射到弹簧的 stiffness 和 damping 参数。三种变体: mount、expand、collapse。
142:
143: **Hover 重展开**: 若 toast 正在收起或已收起，hover 时停止收起动画，重新驱动 morphT 到 1。
144:
145: ### 状态管理
146:
147: 用 Vue `reactive`/`ref` 替代 React 版的模块级变量 + pub/sub:
148:
149: ```typescript
150: // 全局配置
151: export const _config = reactive<GlobalConfig>({ ... })
152:
153: // Toast 列表
154: export const _toasts = ref<ToastData[]>([])
155:
156: // 容器 hover
157: export const containerHovered = ref(false)
158:
159: // ARIA 播报
160: export const _announcements = ref<{ message: string; politeness: string } | null>(null)
161: ```
162:
163: Vue 的响应式系统使得任何组件都可以直接 `watch()` 这些状态，无需手动订阅/取消订阅。
164:
165: ### Composables
166:
167: **usePrefersReducedMotion**: `matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')` 监听，返回 `readonly ref<boolean>`。
168:
169: **useToastTimer**: 封装自动关闭计时器逻辑。接收 `duration`、`onTimeout` 回调。暴露 `start()`、`pause()`、`resume()`、`reset()`。内部用 `remainingTime` 和 `timerStart` 追踪暂停/恢复。
170:
171: **useSwipeToDismiss**: 封装 `pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup` 手势。返回 `{ deltaX, opacity, swiping }`。位移超阈值时调用 `onDismiss` 回调。
172:
173: ### 公开 API
174:
175: ```typescript
176: // 组件
177: export { default as GooeyToaster } from './components/GooeyToaster.vue'
178:
179: // Toast 函数
180: export { gooeyToast } from './gooey-toast'
181:
182: // 预设
183: export { animationPresets } from './presets'
184:
185: // 类型
186: export type {
187:   AnimationPreset, AnimationPresetName,
188:   GooeyToastOptions, GooeyPromiseData, GooeyToasterProps,
189:   GooeyToastAction, GooeyToastClassNames, GooeyToastTimings,
190:   GooeyToastUpdateOptions, DismissFilter,
191: }
192:
193: // 向后兼容别名
194: export { default as GoeyToaster } from './components/GooeyToaster.vue'
195: export { gooeyToast as goeyToast } from './gooey-toast'
196: ```
197:
198: ### 类型定义
199:
200: 直接复用 React 版的类型定义，移除 React 特有类型（ReactNode → VNode | string，FC → 无需）。
201:
202: GooeyToasterProps 中去掉 Sonner 特有的 `toastOptions`、`richColors` 等，保留所有实际使用的配置。
203:
204: ### CSS 样式
205:
206: 直接复用 `GooeyToast.css`，仅需微调：
207: - 移除依赖 Sonner 的 CSS 变量（`--initial-height`、`--offset`）
208: - 新增 ToastContainer 的定位/堆叠样式
209: - 其余（颜色、动画、深色模式）完全复用
210:
211: ### 无障碍支持
212:
213: - AriaLiveAnnouncer: 两个 visually-hidden div（polite/assertive），与 React 版逻辑一致
214: - Toast role: success/info 用 `role="status"`，error/warning 用 `role="alert"`
215: - 错误边界: `onErrorCaptured()` 生命周期钩子，渲染 fallback UI
216:
217: ### 错误边界
218:
219: Vue 没有 React 的 Error Boundary class 组件，使用 `onErrorCaptured()` 实现：
220:
221: ```vue
222: <!-- ToastErrorBoundary.vue -->
223: <script setup>
224: const hasError = ref(false)
225: onErrorCaptured((err) => {
226:   hasError.value = true
227:   console.error('[GooeyToast] Error:', err)
228:   return false  // 阻止向上传播
229: })
230: </script>
231: <template>
232:   <slot v-if="!hasError" />
233:   <div v-else class="gooey-error-fallback">Toast Error</div>
234: </template>
235: ```
236:
237: ## 可直接复用的代码（约 40%）
238:
239: | 文件 | 来源 | 修改程度 |
240: |---|---|---|
241: | morph.ts | GooeyToast.tsx 提取 | 无修改 |
242: | spring.ts | GooeyToast.tsx 提取 | 无修改 |
243: | presets.ts | presets.ts | 无修改 |
244: | types.ts | types.ts | 移除 ReactNode，改用 VNode/string |
245: | GooeyToast.css | GooeyToast.css | 微调（移除 Sonner CSS 变量） |
246: | gooey-styles.ts | gooey-styles.ts | 无修改 |
247: | 队列逻辑 | gooey-toast.tsx | 核心逻辑复用，接口层重写 |
248: | 图标 SVG path | icons/*.tsx | SVG 数据复用，组件格式改为 .vue |
249:
250: ## 需要重写的代码（约 60%）
251:
252: | 文件 | 复杂度 | 说明 |
253: |---|---|---|
254: | GooeyToast.vue | 高 | 最复杂的组件，需将 React hooks/effects 转为 Vue composables/watchers |
255: | ToastContainer.vue | 中高 | 全新组件，替代 Sonner 的堆叠/定位 |
256: | GooeyToaster.vue | 中 | 配置同步、键盘事件、hover 检测 |
257: | gooey-toast.ts | 中 | 去除 Sonner/React 依赖，改用 reactive store |
258: | context.ts | 低 | 变量转为 reactive/ref |
259: | 6 个 Icon.vue | 低 | JSX → SFC 模板 |
260: | composables | 中 | 新的 composable 封装 |
261: | 测试套件 | 中 | @testing-library/react → @vue/test-utils |
262:
263: ## 构建配置
264:
265: 使用 Vite 库模式（而非 tsup）处理 .vue SFC：
266:
267: ```typescript
268: // vite.config.ts
269: import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
270: import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'
271: import dts from 'vite-plugin-dts'
272:
273: export default defineConfig({
274:   plugins: [vue(), dts({ rollupTypes: true })],
275:   build: {
276:     lib: {
277:       entry: 'src/index.ts',
278:       formats: ['es', 'cjs'],
279:       fileName: (format) => `index.${format === 'es' ? 'js' : 'cjs'}`
280:     },
281:     rollupOptions: {
282:       external: ['vue', 'motion'],
283:       output: { globals: { vue: 'Vue', motion: 'Motion' } }
284:     },
285:     sourcemap: true
286:   }
287: })
288: ```
289:
290: ## 测试策略
291:
292: | 测试类别 | 工具 | 覆盖 |
293: |---|---|---|
294: | 纯函数 | Vitest | morph.ts, spring.ts, 队列逻辑 |
295: | 组件 | Vitest + @vue/test-utils | 渲染、事件、生命周期 |
296: | Composables | Vitest + @vue/test-utils | 计时器、手势、媒体查询 |
297: | 集成 | Vitest | Toast API → 组件渲染完整流程 |

(End of file - total 297 lines)
</content>
````

```
<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/src/gooey-toast.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { useState, useEffect, useRef, type ReactNode } from 'react'
2: import { toast } from 'sonner'
3: import { GooeyToast } from './components/GooeyToast'
4: import { ToastErrorBoundary } from './components/ToastErrorBoundary'
5: import { getGooeyVisibleToasts, getGooeyMaxQueue, getGooeyQueueOverflow, announce, type AriaLivePoliteness } from './context'
6: import type {
7:   GooeyToastOptions,
8:   GooeyPromiseData,
9:   GooeyToastPhase,
10:   GooeyToastType,
11:   GooeyToastAction,
12:   GooeyToastClassNames,
13:   GooeyToastTimings,
14:   GooeyToastUpdateOptions,
15:   DismissFilter,
16: } from './types'
17: import type { AnimationPresetName } from './presets'
18:
19: const DEFAULT_EXPANDED_DURATION = 4000
20:
21: function getAnnouncePoliteness(type: GooeyToastType): AriaLivePoliteness {
22:   return type === 'error' || type === 'warning' ? 'assertive' : 'polite'
23: }
24:
25: function buildAnnouncementMessage(title: string, description?: ReactNode): string {
26:   if (!description || typeof description !== 'string') return title
27:   return `${title}: ${description}`
28: }
29:
30: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
31: // Toast queue — limits concurrent toasts to `visibleToasts` (default 3).
32: // Excess toasts wait in a FIFO queue and fire when a slot opens.
33: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
34: const _activeIds = new Map<string | number, GooeyToastType>()
35: const _queue: Array<{ id: string | number; type: GooeyToastType; create: () => void }> = []
36:
37: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38: // Callback registry — stores onDismiss/onAutoClose per toast ID so they can
39: // be invoked when the toast unmounts. The _autoCloseFlags set tracks toasts
40: // whose dismiss was triggered by the auto-close timer (not manual action).
41: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
42: const _toastCallbacks = new Map<string | number, {
43:   onDismiss?: (id: string | number) => void
44:   onAutoClose?: (id: string | number) => void
45: }>()
46: const _autoCloseFlags = new Set<string | number>()
47: const _manualDismissFlags = new Set<string | number>()
48:
49: /** @internal Mark a toast as being auto-closed (timer-based dismiss). */
50: export function _markAutoClose(id: string | number) {
51:   _autoCloseFlags.add(id)
52: }
53:
54: /** @internal Reset queue state — exported for tests only. */
55: export function _resetQueue() {
56:   _activeIds.clear()
57:   _queue.length = 0
58:   _toastUpdateListeners.clear()
59:   _toastCallbacks.clear()
60:   _autoCloseFlags.clear()
61:   _manualDismissFlags.clear()
62: }
63:
64: /** @internal Get the most recently created active toast ID — used by Escape key handler. */
65: export function _getMostRecentActiveId(): string | number | undefined {
66:   let last: string | number | undefined
67:   for (const id of _activeIds.keys()) last = id
68:   return last
69: }
70:
71: function _processQueue() {
72:   const max = getGooeyVisibleToasts()
73:   while (_queue.length > 0 && _activeIds.size < max) {
74:     const next = _queue.shift()!
75:     _activeIds.set(next.id, next.type)
76:     next.create()
77:   }
78: }
79:
80: function _enqueue(entry: { id: string | number; type: GooeyToastType; create: () => void }): boolean {
81:   const maxQueue = getGooeyMaxQueue()
82:   const overflow = getGooeyQueueOverflow()
83:   if (_queue.length >= maxQueue) {
84:     if (overflow === 'drop-newest') return false
85:     // drop-oldest: remove the oldest queued item
86:     _queue.shift()
87:   }
88:   _queue.push(entry)
89:   return true
90: }
91:
92: function _onToastDismissed(id: string | number) {
93:   if (!_activeIds.delete(id)) return
94:   _toastUpdateListeners.delete(id)
95:
96:   // Invoke callbacks — auto-close is true if explicitly flagged OR if not manually dismissed
97:   const cbs = _toastCallbacks.get(id)
98:   if (cbs) {
99:     const isAutoClose = _autoCloseFlags.has(id) || !_manualDismissFlags.has(id)
100:     if (isAutoClose && cbs.onAutoClose) {
101:       try { cbs.onAutoClose(id) } catch { /* callback errors must not break queue */ }
102:     }
103:     if (cbs.onDismiss) {
104:       try { cbs.onDismiss(id) } catch { /* callback errors must not break queue */ }
105:     }
106:     _toastCallbacks.delete(id)
107:   }
108:   _autoCloseFlags.delete(id)
109:   _manualDismissFlags.delete(id)
110:
111:   _processQueue()
112: }
113:
114: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
115: // Toast update store — allows in-place updates to active toasts.
116: // Each toast wrapper subscribes to its own ID; calling update() stores
117: // partial new props and notifies the listener to re-render.
118: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
119: const _toastUpdateListeners = new Map<string | number, (opts: GooeyToastUpdateOptions) => void>()
120:
121: function updateGooeyToast(id: string | number, options: GooeyToastUpdateOptions) {
122:   const listener = _toastUpdateListeners.get(id)
123:   if (listener) {
124:     listener(options)
125:     // Update the type in _activeIds if the type changed
126:     if (options.type !== undefined && _activeIds.has(id)) {
127:       _activeIds.set(id, options.type)
128:     }
129:     // Announce updated content to screen readers
130:     if (options.title !== undefined) {
131:       announce(
132:         buildAnnouncementMessage(options.title, options.description),
133:         options.type ? getAnnouncePoliteness(options.type) : 'polite',
134:       )
135:     }
136:   }
137: }
138:
139: function GooeyToastWrapper({
140:   initialPhase,
141:   title: initialTitle,
142:   type: initialType,
143:   description: initialDescription,
144:   action: initialAction,
145:   icon,
146:   classNames,
147:   fillColor,
148:   borderColor,
149:   borderWidth,
150:   timing,
151:   preset,
152:   spring,
153:   bounce,
154:   showProgress,
155:   showTimestamp: initialShowTimestamp,
156:   toastId,
157:   onDismiss,
158:   onAutoClose,
159: }: {
160:   initialPhase: GooeyToastPhase
161:   title: string
162:   type: GooeyToastType
163:   description?: ReactNode
164:   action?: GooeyToastAction
165:   icon?: ReactNode
166:   classNames?: GooeyToastClassNames
167:   fillColor?: string
168:   borderColor?: string
169:   borderWidth?: number
170:   timing?: GooeyToastTimings
171:   preset?: AnimationPresetName
172:   spring?: boolean
173:   bounce?: number
174:   showProgress?: boolean
175:   showTimestamp?: boolean
176:   toastId: string | number
177:   onDismiss?: (id: string | number) => void
178:   onAutoClose?: (id: string | number) => void
179: }) {
180:   // Register callbacks so _onToastDismissed can invoke them on unmount
181:   useEffect(() => {
182:     if (onDismiss || onAutoClose) {
183:       _toastCallbacks.set(toastId, { onDismiss, onAutoClose })
184:     }
185:   }, [toastId, onDismiss, onAutoClose])
186:
187:   const [title, setTitle] = useState(initialTitle)
188:   const [type, setType] = useState(initialType)
189:   const [phase, setPhase] = useState<GooeyToastPhase>(initialPhase)
190:   const [description, setDescription] = useState(initialDescription)
191:   const [action, setAction] = useState(initialAction)
192:   const [currentIcon, setCurrentIcon] = useState<ReactNode | undefined>(icon)
193:   const [showTimestamp, setShowTimestamp] = useState(initialShowTimestamp ?? true)
194:
195:   // Subscribe to in-place updates for this toast's ID.
196:   useEffect(() => {
197:     const handleUpdate = (opts: GooeyToastUpdateOptions) => {
198:       if (opts.title !== undefined) setTitle(opts.title)
199:       if (opts.description !== undefined) setDescription(opts.description)
200:       if (opts.type !== undefined) {
201:         setType(opts.type)
202:         setPhase(opts.type)
203:       }
204:       if (opts.action !== undefined) setAction(opts.action)
205:       if ('icon' in opts) setCurrentIcon(opts.icon ?? undefined)
206:       if (opts.showTimestamp !== undefined) setShowTimestamp(opts.showTimestamp)
207:     }
208:     _toastUpdateListeners.set(toastId, handleUpdate)
209:     return () => {
210:       _toastUpdateListeners.delete(toastId)
211:     }
212:   }, [toastId])
213:
214:   // Guarantee the queue slot is freed when this toast unmounts from Sonner's DOM.
215:   // Uses a mounted ref + delayed check to survive React StrictMode's dev-only
216:   // double-mount cycle (mount → unmount → remount) without prematurely freeing the slot.
217:   const mountedRef = useRef(true)
218:   useEffect(() => {
219:     mountedRef.current = true
220:     return () => {
221:       mountedRef.current = false
222:       setTimeout(() => {
223:         if (!mountedRef.current) _onToastDismissed(toastId)
224:       }, 100)
225:     }
226:   }, [toastId])
227:
228:   return (
229:     <ToastErrorBoundary>
230:       <GooeyToast
231:         title={title}
232:         description={description}
233:         type={type}
234:         action={action}
235:         icon={currentIcon}
236:         phase={phase}
237:         classNames={classNames}
238:         fillColor={fillColor}
239:         borderColor={borderColor}
240:         borderWidth={borderWidth}
241:         timing={timing}
242:         preset={preset}
243:         spring={spring}
244:         bounce={bounce}
245:         showProgress={showProgress}
246:         showTimestamp={showTimestamp}
247:         toastId={toastId}
248:       />
249:     </ToastErrorBoundary>
250:   )
251: }
252:
253: function PromiseToastWrapper<T>({
254:   promise,
255:   data,
256:   toastId,
257: }: {
258:   promise: Promise<T>
259:   data: GooeyPromiseData<T>
260:   toastId: string | number
261: }) {
262:   const [phase, setPhase] = useState<GooeyToastPhase>('loading')
263:   const [title, setTitle] = useState(data.loading)
264:   const [description, setDescription] = useState<ReactNode | undefined>(data.description?.loading)
265:   const [action, setAction] = useState<GooeyToastAction | undefined>(undefined)
266:
267:   // Register callbacks so _onToastDismissed can invoke them on unmount
268:   useEffect(() => {
269:     if (data.onDismiss || data.onAutoClose) {
270:       _toastCallbacks.set(toastId, { onDismiss: data.onDismiss, onAutoClose: data.onAutoClose })
271:     }
272:   }, [toastId, data.onDismiss, data.onAutoClose])
273:
274:   // Guarantee the queue slot is freed when this toast unmounts from Sonner's DOM.
275:   const mountedRef = useRef(true)
276:   useEffect(() => {
277:     mountedRef.current = true
278:     return () => {
279:       mountedRef.current = false
280:       setTimeout(() => {
281:         if (!mountedRef.current) _onToastDismissed(toastId)
282:       }, 100)
283:     }
284:   }, [toastId])
285:
286:   useEffect(() => {
287:     const resetDuration = (hasExpandedContent: boolean) => {
288:       const baseDuration = data.timing?.displayDuration ?? (hasExpandedContent ? DEFAULT_EXPANDED_DURATION : undefined)
289:       const collapseDurMs = 0.9 * 1000
290:       const duration = baseDuration != null && hasExpandedContent ? baseDuration + collapseDurMs : baseDuration
291:       if (duration != null) {
292:         toast.custom(() => (
293:           <PromiseToastWrapper promise={promise} data={data} toastId={toastId} />
294:         ), { id: toastId, duration })
295:       }
296:     }
297:
298:     promise
299:       .then((result) => {
300:         const desc = typeof data.description?.success === 'function'
301:           ? data.description.success(result)
302:           : data.description?.success
303:         const resolvedTitle = typeof data.success === 'function'
304:           ? data.success(result)
305:           : data.success
306:         setTitle(resolvedTitle)
307:         setDescription(desc)
308:         setAction(data.action?.success)
309:         setPhase('success')
310:         resetDuration(Boolean(desc || data.action?.success))
311:         announce(buildAnnouncementMessage(resolvedTitle, desc), 'polite')
312:       })
313:       .catch((err) => {
314:         const desc = typeof data.description?.error === 'function'
315:           ? data.description.error(err)
316:           : data.description?.error
317:         const resolvedTitle = typeof data.error === 'function' ? data.error(err) : data.error
318:         setTitle(resolvedTitle)
319:         setDescription(desc)
320:         setAction(data.action?.error)
321:         setPhase('error')
322:         resetDuration(Boolean(desc || data.action?.error))
323:         announce(buildAnnouncementMessage(resolvedTitle, desc), 'assertive')
324:       })
325:   }, [])
326:
327:   return (
328:     <ToastErrorBoundary>
329:       <GooeyToast
330:         title={title}
331:         description={description}
332:         type={phase === 'loading' ? 'info' : (phase as GooeyToastType)}
333:         action={action}
334:         phase={phase}
335:         classNames={data.classNames}
336:         fillColor={data.fillColor}
337:         borderColor={data.borderColor}
338:         borderWidth={data.borderWidth}
339:         timing={data.timing}
340:         preset={data.preset}
341:         spring={data.spring}
342:         bounce={data.bounce}
343:         showTimestamp={data.showTimestamp ?? true}
344:         toastId={toastId}
345:       />
346:     </ToastErrorBoundary>
347:   )
348: }
349:
350: function createGooeyToast(
351:   title: string,
352:   type: GooeyToastType,
353:   options?: GooeyToastOptions
354: ) {
355:   const hasExpandedContent = Boolean(options?.description || options?.action)
356:   const baseDuration = options?.timing?.displayDuration ?? options?.duration ?? (options?.description ? DEFAULT_EXPANDED_DURATION : undefined)
357:   // Expanded toasts: Infinity duration, component controls dismiss (hover re-expand support)
358:   // Simple toasts: normal duration
359:   const duration = hasExpandedContent ? Infinity : baseDuration
360:
361:   const toastId = options?.id ?? Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)
362:
363:   const create = () => {
364:     toast.custom(
365:       () => (
366:         <GooeyToastWrapper
367:           initialPhase={type}
368:           title={title}
369:           type={type}
370:           description={options?.description}
371:           action={options?.action}
372:           icon={options?.icon}
373:           classNames={options?.classNames}
374:           fillColor={options?.fillColor}
375:           borderColor={options?.borderColor}
376:           borderWidth={options?.borderWidth}
377:           timing={options?.timing}
378:           preset={options?.preset}
379:           spring={options?.spring}
380:           bounce={options?.bounce}
381:           showProgress={options?.showProgress}
382:           showTimestamp={options?.showTimestamp}
383:           toastId={toastId}
384:           onDismiss={options?.onDismiss}
385:           onAutoClose={options?.onAutoClose}
386:         />
387:       ),
388:       {
389:         duration,
390:         id: toastId,
391:       }
392:     )
393:   }
394:
395:   // Register callbacks before creating the toast so they're available on unmount
396:   if (options?.onDismiss || options?.onAutoClose) {
397:     _toastCallbacks.set(toastId, { onDismiss: options.onDismiss, onAutoClose: options.onAutoClose })
398:   }
399:
400:   // Announce to screen readers via the persistent ARIA live region
401:   announce(
402:     buildAnnouncementMessage(title, options?.description),
403:     getAnnouncePoliteness(type),
404:   )
405:
406:   if (_activeIds.size < getGooeyVisibleToasts()) {
407:     _activeIds.set(toastId, type)
408:     create()
409:   } else {
410:     _enqueue({ id: toastId, type, create })
411:   }
412:
413:   return toastId
414: }
415:
416: function dismissGooeyToast(idOrFilter?: string | number | DismissFilter) {
417:   if (idOrFilter != null && typeof idOrFilter === 'object') {
418:     // Dismiss by type filter
419:     const filterTypes = Array.isArray(idOrFilter.type) ? idOrFilter.type : [idOrFilter.type]
420:     const typesSet = new Set<GooeyToastType>(filterTypes)
421:
422:     // Remove matching toasts from the queue
423:     for (let i = _queue.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
424:       if (typesSet.has(_queue[i].type)) {
425:         _queue.splice(i, 1)
426:       }
427:     }
428:
429:     // Dismiss matching active toasts via Sonner
430:     for (const [id, toastType] of _activeIds) {
431:       if (typesSet.has(toastType)) {
432:         _manualDismissFlags.add(id)
433:         toast.dismiss(id)
434:       }
435:     }
436:   } else if (idOrFilter != null) {
437:     // Dismiss by specific ID
438:     const idx = _queue.findIndex(q => q.id === idOrFilter)
439:     if (idx !== -1) {
440:       _queue.splice(idx, 1)
441:       return
442:     }
443:     // Mark as manual dismiss so onAutoClose is NOT called
444:     _manualDismissFlags.add(idOrFilter)
445:     // Dismiss from Sonner — unmount cleanup in GooeyToastWrapper handles activeIds + queue
446:     toast.dismiss(idOrFilter)
447:   } else {
448:     // Dismiss all: mark all active as manual dismiss, clear queue and dismiss
449:     for (const id of _activeIds.keys()) {
450:       _manualDismissFlags.add(id)
451:     }
452:     _queue.length = 0
453:     _activeIds.clear()
454:     toast.dismiss()
455:   }
456: }
457:
458: export const gooeyToast = Object.assign(
459:   (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
460:     createGooeyToast(title, 'default', options),
461:   {
462:     success: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
463:       createGooeyToast(title, 'success', options),
464:     error: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
465:       createGooeyToast(title, 'error', options),
466:     warning: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
467:       createGooeyToast(title, 'warning', options),
468:     info: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
469:       createGooeyToast(title, 'info', options),
470:     promise: <T,>(promise: Promise<T>, data: GooeyPromiseData<T>) => {
471:       const id = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)
472:
473:       // Announce loading state to screen readers
474:       announce(buildAnnouncementMessage(data.loading, data.description?.loading), 'polite')
475:
476:       // Register callbacks before creating the toast
477:       if (data.onDismiss || data.onAutoClose) {
478:         _toastCallbacks.set(id, { onDismiss: data.onDismiss, onAutoClose: data.onAutoClose })
479:       }
480:
481:       const create = () => {
482:         toast.custom(() => (
483:           <PromiseToastWrapper promise={promise} data={data} toastId={id} />
484:         ), {
485:           id,
486:           duration: (data.timing?.displayDuration != null || data.description) ? Infinity : undefined,
487:         })
488:       }
489:
490:       if (_activeIds.size < getGooeyVisibleToasts()) {
491:         _activeIds.set(id, 'info')
492:         create()
493:       } else {
494:         _enqueue({ id, type: 'info', create })
495:       }
496:
497:       return id
498:     },
499:     dismiss: dismissGooeyToast,
500:     update: updateGooeyToast,
501:   }
502: )

(End of file - total 502 lines)
</content>
```

```
1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
2:
3: const QUERY = '(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'
4:
5: function getInitialState(): boolean {
6:   if (typeof window === 'undefined' || typeof window.matchMedia !== 'function') {
7:     return false
8:   }
9:   return window.matchMedia(QUERY).matches
10: }
11:
12: export function usePrefersReducedMotion(): boolean {
13:   const [prefersReducedMotion, setPrefersReducedMotion] = useState(getInitialState)
14:
15:   useEffect(() => {
16:     if (typeof window === 'undefined' || typeof window.matchMedia !== 'function') {
17:       return
18:     }
19:     const mql = window.matchMedia(QUERY)
20:     const handler = (event: MediaQueryListEvent) => {
21:       setPrefersReducedMotion(event.matches)
22:     }
23:     mql.addEventListener('change', handler)
24:     return () => mql.removeEventListener('change', handler)
25:   }, [])
26:
27:   return prefersReducedMotion
28: }

(End of file - total 28 lines)
</content>
```

```
<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/src/components/AriaLiveAnnouncer.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
2: import { subscribeAnnouncements } from '../context'
3:
4: /**
5:  * Persistent ARIA live region that announces toast notifications to screen readers.
6:  *
7:  * Two regions are rendered (polite + assertive) so the correct politeness level
8:  * is used per toast type. Both regions are visually hidden but remain in the DOM
9:  * so screen readers can detect content changes reliably.
10:  *
11:  * Messages are cleared after a short delay to avoid stale announcements
12:  * accumulating in the live region.
13:  */
14: export function AriaLiveAnnouncer() {
15:   const [politeMessage, setPoliteMessage] = useState('')
16:   const [assertiveMessage, setAssertiveMessage] = useState('')
17:
18:   const handleAnnouncement = useCallback(({ message, politeness }: { message: string; politeness: 'polite' | 'assertive' }) => {
19:     if (politeness === 'assertive') {
20:       // Clear first to ensure re-announcement of identical messages
21:       setAssertiveMessage('')
22:       requestAnimationFrame(() => setAssertiveMessage(message))
23:     } else {
24:       setPoliteMessage('')
25:       requestAnimationFrame(() => setPoliteMessage(message))
26:     }
27:   }, [])
28:
29:   useEffect(() => {
30:     return subscribeAnnouncements(handleAnnouncement)
31:   }, [handleAnnouncement])
32:
33:   // Clear messages after screen reader has had time to announce them
34:   useEffect(() => {
35:     if (!politeMessage) return
36:     const t = setTimeout(() => setPoliteMessage(''), 7000)
37:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
38:   }, [politeMessage])
39:
40:   useEffect(() => {
41:     if (!assertiveMessage) return
42:     const t = setTimeout(() => setAssertiveMessage(''), 7000)
43:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
44:   }, [assertiveMessage])
45:
46:   const visuallyHidden: React.CSSProperties = {
47:     position: 'absolute',
48:     width: '1px',
49:     height: '1px',
50:     padding: 0,
51:     margin: '-1px',
52:     overflow: 'hidden',
53:     clip: 'rect(0, 0, 0, 0)',
54:     whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
55:     border: 0,
56:   }
57:
58:   return (
59:     <>
60:       <div
61:         role="status"
62:         aria-live="polite"
63:         aria-atomic="true"
64:         style={visuallyHidden}
65:       >
66:         {politeMessage}
67:       </div>
68:       <div
69:         role="alert"
70:         aria-live="assertive"
71:         aria-atomic="true"
72:         style={visuallyHidden}
73:       >
74:         {assertiveMessage}
75:       </div>
76:     </>
77:   )
78: }
```

```
<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/src/components/GooeyToaster.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { useEffect } from 'react'
2: import { Toaster } from 'sonner'
3: import type { GooeyToasterProps } from '../types'
4: import { animationPresets } from '../presets'
5: import { setGooeyPosition, setGooeyDir, setGooeySpring, setGooeyBounce, setGooeyVisibleToasts, setContainerHovered, setGooeySwipeToDismiss, setGooeyCloseOnEscape, setGooeyTheme, setGooeyMaxQueue, setGooeyQueueOverflow, setGooeyShowProgress, setGooeyCloseButton } from '../context'
6: import { gooeyToast, _getMostRecentActiveId } from '../gooey-toast'
7: import { AriaLiveAnnouncer } from './AriaLiveAnnouncer'
8:
9: export function GooeyToaster({
10:   position = 'bottom-right',
11:   duration,
12:   gap = 14,
13:   offset = '24px',
14:   theme = 'light',
15:   toastOptions,
16:   expand,
17:   closeButton,
18:   richColors,
19:   visibleToasts,
20:   dir,
21:   preset,
22:   spring,
23:   bounce,
24:   swipeToDismiss = true,
25:   closeOnEscape = true,
26:   maxQueue = Infinity,
27:   queueOverflow = 'drop-oldest',
28:   showProgress = false,
29: }: GooeyToasterProps) {
30:   const presetConfig = preset ? animationPresets[preset] : undefined
31:   const resolvedSpring = spring ?? presetConfig?.spring ?? true
32:   const resolvedBounce = bounce ?? presetConfig?.bounce
33:
34:   useEffect(() => {
35:     setGooeyPosition(position)
36:   }, [position])
37:
38:   useEffect(() => {
39:     setGooeyDir(dir ?? 'ltr')
40:   }, [dir])
41:
42:   useEffect(() => {
43:     setGooeyTheme(theme)
44:   }, [theme])
45:
46:   useEffect(() => {
47:     setGooeySpring(resolvedSpring)
48:   }, [resolvedSpring])
49:
50:   useEffect(() => {
51:     setGooeyBounce(resolvedBounce)
52:   }, [resolvedBounce])
53:
54:   useEffect(() => {
55:     setGooeySwipeToDismiss(swipeToDismiss)
56:   }, [swipeToDismiss])
57:
58:   useEffect(() => {
59:     setGooeyCloseOnEscape(closeOnEscape)
60:   }, [closeOnEscape])
61:
62:   useEffect(() => {
63:     if (!closeOnEscape) return
64:
65:     const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
66:       if (e.key === 'Escape') {
67:         const recentId = _getMostRecentActiveId()
68:         if (recentId != null) {
69:           gooeyToast.dismiss(recentId)
70:         }
71:       }
72:     }
73:
74:     document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
75:     return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
76:   }, [closeOnEscape])
77:
78:   useEffect(() => {
79:     setGooeyVisibleToasts(visibleToasts ?? 3)
80:   }, [visibleToasts])
81:
82:   useEffect(() => {
83:     setGooeyMaxQueue(maxQueue)
84:   }, [maxQueue])
85:
86:   useEffect(() => {
87:     setGooeyQueueOverflow(queueOverflow)
88:   }, [queueOverflow])
89:
90:   useEffect(() => {
91:     setGooeyShowProgress(showProgress)
92:   }, [showProgress])
93:
94:   useEffect(() => {
95:     setGooeyCloseButton(closeButton ?? false)
96:   }, [closeButton])
97:
98:   // Detect hover on the Sonner container and broadcast to all GooeyToast instances.
99:   // Uses Sonner's `data-expanded` attribute (set per-toast <li>) as the hover signal
100:   // rather than raw mouseenter/mouseleave on the <ol>. This is more reliable because
101:   // Sonner manages it with onMouseEnter + onMouseMove + onMouseLeave, and it survives
102:   // <ol> remounts (all toasts dismissed then new ones appear).
103:   useEffect(() => {
104:     let expandObs: MutationObserver | null = null
105:     let currentOl: HTMLElement | null = null
106:
107:     const syncFromExpanded = (ol: HTMLElement) => {
108:       const anyExpanded = ol.querySelector('[data-sonner-toast][data-expanded="true"]') !== null
109:       setContainerHovered(anyExpanded)
110:     }
111:
112:     const attach = (ol: HTMLElement) => {
113:       if (ol === currentOl) return
114:       expandObs?.disconnect()
115:       currentOl = ol
116:       expandObs = new MutationObserver(() => syncFromExpanded(ol))
117:       expandObs.observe(ol, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['data-expanded'], subtree: true })
118:       syncFromExpanded(ol)
119:     }
120:
121:     const el = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[data-sonner-toaster]')
122:     if (el) attach(el)
123:
124:     // Re-discover if the <ol> is remounted (e.g. all toasts dismissed then new ones appear).
125:     // Debounce via rAF to coalesce rapid DOM mutations (e.g. multiple toasts mounting).
126:     let bodyRafId = 0
127:     const bodyObs = new MutationObserver(() => {
128:       if (bodyRafId) return
129:       bodyRafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
130:         bodyRafId = 0
131:         const found = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[data-sonner-toaster]')
132:         if (found) {
133:           attach(found)
134:         } else if (currentOl) {
135:           expandObs?.disconnect()
136:           currentOl = null
137:           setContainerHovered(false)
138:         }
139:       })
140:     })
141:     bodyObs.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true })
142:
143:     return () => {
144:       if (bodyRafId) cancelAnimationFrame(bodyRafId)
145:       bodyObs.disconnect()
146:       expandObs?.disconnect()
147:       setContainerHovered(false)
148:     }
149:   }, [])
150:
151:   useEffect(() => {
152:     if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'development') return
153:
154:     const el = document.createElement('div')
155:     el.setAttribute('data-gooey-toast-css', '')
156:     el.style.position = 'absolute'
157:     el.style.width = '0'
158:     el.style.height = '0'
159:     el.style.overflow = 'hidden'
160:     el.style.pointerEvents = 'none'
161:     document.body.appendChild(el)
162:
163:     const value = getComputedStyle(el).getPropertyValue('--gooey-toast')
164:     document.body.removeChild(el)
165:
166:     if (!value) {
167:       console.warn(
168:         '[gooey-toast] Styles not found. Make sure to import the CSS:\n\n' +
169:         '  import "goey-toast/styles.css";\n'
170:       )
171:     }
172:   }, [])
173:
174:   return (
175:     <>
176:       <Toaster
177:         position={position}
178:         duration={duration}
179:         gap={gap}
180:         offset={offset}
181:         theme={theme}
182:         toastOptions={{ unstyled: true, ...toastOptions }}
183:         expand={expand}
184:         closeButton={false}
185:         richColors={richColors}
186:         visibleToasts={99}
187:         dir={dir}
188:       />
189:       <AriaLiveAnnouncer />
190:     </>
191:   )
192: }

(End of file - total 192 lines)
</content>
```
